items.title: Artificial Intelligence: A Modern Approach (Russell & Norvig)
items.author: Stuart Russell, Peter Norvig
items.note: Standard textbook framing of AI as intelligent agents; covers search, logic, learning, and planning.

items.title: Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy — Artificial Intelligence
items.author: Stanford Encyclopedia of Philosophy
items.note: Philosophical and technical overview of AI goals, approaches, and narrow vs general intelligence.

items.title: NIST AI Risk Management Framework
items.author: National Institute of Standards and Technology
items.note: Practical vocabulary for trustworthy AI systems in deployment—complements narrow-AI product framing.
